case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. MARIA E PRADO DE PIMENTEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRADO DE PIMENTEL, MARIA E $3,664.99 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,905.99, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049028), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. SERVED AUG-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRADO DE PIMENTEL, MARIA E

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT PRADO DE PIMENTEL, MARIA E DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2019
COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2) 2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200007567) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 200007567) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200007567) AS TO DEFENDANT PRADO DE PIMENTEL, MARIA E
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200007567) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
